'''kangatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sialometabolism|sialometabolism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sialometabolism|sialometabolism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kangatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kængæthæth|kængæthæth]] || [[word:kængæthæj|kængæthæj]] || [[word:kængæthæsh|kængæthæsh]] || [[word:kængæthæ|kængæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangangathath|kangangathath]] || [[word:kangangathaj|kangangathaj]] || [[word:kangangathash|kangangathash]] || [[word:kangangatha|kangangatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangathath|kangathath]] || [[word:kangathaj|kangathaj]] || [[word:kangathash|kangathash]] || [[word:kangatha|kangatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangafthafth|kangafthafth]] || [[word:kangafthafj|kangafthafj]] || [[word:kangafthafsh|kangafthafsh]] || [[word:kangafthaf|kangafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kangathatha|kangathatha]] || [[word:kangathaja|kangathaja]] || [[word:kangathasha|kangathasha]] || [[word:kangathaka|kangathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kangathath|kangathath]] || [[word:kangathaj|kangathaj]] || [[word:kangathash|kangathash]] || [[word:kangatha|kangatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kangathathal|kangathathal]] || [[word:kangathajal|kangathajal]] || [[word:kangathashal|kangathashal]] || [[word:kangathakal|kangathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kangathaathatha|kangathaathatha]] || [[word:kangathaajaja|kangathaajaja]] || [[word:kangathaashasha|kangathaashasha]] || [[word:kangathaaka|kangathaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kangathathan|kangathathan]] || [[word:kangathajan|kangathajan]] || [[word:kangathashan|kangathashan]] || [[word:kangathakan|kangathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kangathathaoro|kangathathaoro]] || [[word:kangathajaoro|kangathajaoro]] || [[word:kangathashaoro|kangathashaoro]] || [[word:kangathakaoro|kangathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
